overall.description: A cinematic drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), moving along an elevated multi-lane highway beneath an Arasaka corporate overpass and through a covered urban corridor. The footage features steady vehicle-mounted camera movement past heavy traffic and towering modern architecture with glass-enclosed walkways.

events.description: camera passes directly under the Arasaka overpass structure
exiting the overpass shadow into the open street corridor

agents.ego_description: driving forward through moderate traffic under the overpass

notable_agents.action: red truck passing by on the right side
black car driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large corporate billboard with Arasaka branding spanning the highway width
secondary digital billboard displaying Techwire advertisement
yellow-orange metal safety railing along the left roadside
tall dark-tinted glass building with illuminated window patterns
tall modern building with geometric facade on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a drive under a massive Arasaka corporate overpass in a futuristic city. The camera moves steadily forward beneath the structure, passing orange safety railings on the left while various vehicles pass by. The lighting is diffused and overcast, with tall glass skyscrapers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor with geometric building facades

events.description: entering the covered walkway corridor with glass structures on the left
lighting shifts to mix of natural and artificial sources from building illumination

agents.ego_description: navigating through traffic past the geometric buildings and billboards

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car overtaking on the right side
oncoming traffic in the opposite lanes

entered.detail: building facade with triangular geometric patterns and reflective metallic surfaces
large digital billboard displaying COLA advertisement with bottle image
elevated glass and metal enclosed pedestrian walkway on the left side

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene transitions to an open corridor lined with geometric-patterned buildings. A prominent COLA billboard appears on the right while a glass-enclosed pedestrian walkway becomes visible on the left. The camera continues driving forward through moderate traffic as the architecture becomes more futuristic and enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban highway with enclosed pedestrian walkways

events.description: road curves gently to the right while maintaining speed
passing a cluster of slower vehicles in the right lane

agents.ego_description: cruising through the covered corridor section with consistent traffic flow

notable_agents.action: white convertible driving alongside in the right lane
red sports car ahead changing lanes to the right

entered.detail: enclosed metal and glass walkway with yellow interior lighting on the right side
overhead bridge structure connecting the buildings across the highway
tall building with palm trees visible on the balconies and terraces

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deep into a covered urban corridor with enclosed walkways on both sides. The glass walkway on the left is now close to the camera, while a metal-covered walkway with yellow lighting runs along the right. The road curves gently through the canyon of futuristic buildings as various sports cars and vehicles pass by or are overtaken.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from beneath a massive corporate overpass into a densely enclosed futuristic urban corridor. It begins by moving steadily under the heavy structure of an Arasaka overpass, passing orange safety railings and distant glass skyscrapers under a diffused, overcast sky. As the camera exits the overpass, the environment opens into a corridor of geometric buildings where a prominent COLA billboard appears on the right and a glass pedestrian walkway emerges on the left. The scene then shifts deeper into a covered urban canyon, with the glass walkway drawing closer on the left while a metal-covered path with yellow lighting lines the right. Finally, the road curves gently through this architectural enclosure, weaving through traffic and passing sleek sports cars beneath the towering city structures.
